confirmed.description: Stuck-running state never reset by session-start — error table says 'resolved on next session-start' but the guard (if state!=running→write) explicitly prevents that reset.
confirmed.resolution: Add TTL expiry logic: if state==running and started_at is older than TTL, overwrite regardless of guard.

confirmed.description: Orphan-trigger: if session dies before CronCreate fires, state=running is stuck and no retrieve ever runs.
confirmed.resolution: Add TTL check in session-start before writing state=running.

confirmed.description: Briefing stale path calls CronCreate but never writes state=running — duplicate jobs on back-to-back briefing invocations.
confirmed.resolution: Briefing stale path must write state=running before calling CronCreate.

confirmed.description: Permanent cross-session prefetch deadlock after retrieve crash — every subsequent session-start sees state=running and outputs retrieveTrigger=false with no escape.
confirmed.resolution: Same TTL fix as F2 collapses this cluster.

confirmed.description: $STARTED_AT used in retrieve Step 10 but never assigned — every retrieve writes started_at as empty string (silent data corruption).
confirmed.resolution: Add STARTED_AT=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) to retrieve Step 0; use in Step 10.

confirmed.description: check-retrieve-freshness.sh exits 2 for state=running with no duration TTL — crashed retrieve from days ago produces EXIT=2 forever.
confirmed.resolution: Add max-running-duration TTL to freshness script: if started_at older than TTL, exit 1 instead of 2.

confirmed.description: Two-session session_id mismatch consequence undocumented — silent fallback to time-only check.
confirmed.resolution: Add spec note clarifying session_id mismatch falls through to time-based freshness.

confirmed.description: Non-atomic echo redirect for state file writes — concurrent writes can corrupt.
confirmed.resolution: Write to temp file then mv for atomic replacement.

confirmed.description: Empty-string CLAUDE_SESSION_ID causes spurious session match — fallback only triggers on absent var, not empty.
confirmed.resolution: Guard must check both absent and empty CLAUDE_SESSION_ID.

confirmed.description: Briefing has no mechanism to read completed_at for banner — freshness script returns exit code only.
confirmed.resolution: Freshness script must emit completed_at to stdout on exit 0/2 so briefing can display 'data as of' banner.

confirmed.description: Test #10 tests missing session_id field in state file, but spec defines fallback on missing CLAUDE_SESSION_ID env var — different conditions.
confirmed.resolution: Split test #10 into two cases: absent env var and absent state file field.

confirmed.description: YAML parser for ingest.yaml unspecified in check-retrieve-freshness.sh — yq/python3/grep have different failure modes.
confirmed.resolution: Spec must name the parser (yq or python3).

confirmed.description: retrieveTrigger→CronCreate is an LLM behavioral contract with no fallback — silent drop if Claude ignores the flag.
confirmed.resolution: Document LLM contract risk; TTL-based recovery in session-start is the fallback.

confirmed.description: retrieve Step 0 unconditionally overwrites session_id — in two-session race, wrong session_id stamped on completed state.
confirmed.resolution: Document that session_id stomp is intentional (last-writer-wins); note consequence.

confirmed.description: Within-session stuck banner: crashed retrieve leaves briefing showing in-progress banner for entire session.
confirmed.resolution: TTL fix in freshness script also heals within-session case.

confirmed.description: Banner references 'session start' timestamp not stored in state file — started_at is retrieve-start, not session-start.
confirmed.resolution: Change banner copy to 'data as of <started_at>' or add session_start field to state file.

confirmed.description: TOCTOU: two concurrent session-starts both read state=idle before either writes — both pass duplicate guard and both fire CronCreate.
confirmed.resolution: Acknowledge in error table; consider flock or write-to-temp-then-mv guard.

confirmed.description: started_at authority unclear — session-start writes T1, retrieve Step 0 overwrites with T2.
confirmed.resolution: Document which is authoritative (retrieve's T2) or remove from session-start write.

confirmed.description: CronCreate one-shot semantics asserted but API contract not cited.
confirmed.resolution: Cite CronCreate API contract for one-shot semantics in spec.

confirmed.description: No mkdir -p before state file write — fails silently if ~/.xgh/ missing.
confirmed.resolution: Add mkdir -p ~/.xgh/ before any state file write.

confirmed.description: Test #20 grep targets retrieve/config skills but spec places briefing_staleness_minutes in ingest.yaml schema section.
confirmed.resolution: Test #20 must grep ingest.yaml schema location.

confirmed.description: No value validation for briefing_staleness_minutes — 0 makes every retrieve immediately stale.
confirmed.resolution: Spec must state 'must be a positive integer'; treat 0 or negative as default (30).

confirmed.description: CronCreate failure in briefing stale path silently omits banner — user gets stale data with no signal.
confirmed.resolution: Show static '⚠ data may be stale' banner when CronCreate fails.

confirmed.description: EXIT=2 banner same missing-timestamp root cause as F21 — second code path.
confirmed.resolution: F21 fix closes this path.

confirmed.description: CronCreate child may not inherit CLAUDE_SESSION_ID — retrieve Step 0 overwrites session_id with empty.
confirmed.resolution: Spec must define CLAUDE_SESSION_ID propagation for CronCreate child environment.

confirmed.description: Missing ingest.yaml file entirely is unspecified — default-30 fallback only covers missing key within existing file.
confirmed.resolution: Spec must define behavior when ingest.yaml is absent (treat as default-30).

debunked.reason: Crash before Step 10 leaves state=running, not state=complete; corrupted JSON already covered.
Framing applies to read/decide logic; retrieve writing directly is correct producer pattern.

debunked.description: test#19 keyword grep insufficient to prove non-blocking
debunked.reason: Structural regression guard is valid; not actionable.

debunked.description: test#10 missing field vs missing env var
debunked.reason: Both produce null/empty — same code path in practice.

debunked.description: test#20 'or config skill' passes by accident

debunked.reason: EXIT=2 provides sufficient signal on re-invocation; spec need not narrate every re-entry.

debunked.description: test suite has no decision logic coverage
debunked.reason: Tests 2-10 run actual script against mock state files — that IS behavioral testing.

debunked.description: time-only fallback field unspecified for state=running
debunked.reason: Time check is in state==complete branch only; state==running exits 2 immediately with no time comparison.

debunked.description: missing state file exit code unspecified
debunked.reason: Spec line 57 explicitly states: state file missing → exit 1 (stale).

meta.note: Judge reported convergence at round 3 but deterministic check failed (different finding IDs each round). Ran full 4 rounds.
top_fixes: F2+F25+F35: Add running_since TTL (10 min) to freshness script and session-start guard
F33: Assign STARTED_AT=$(date) in retrieve Step 0
F6: Briefing stale path writes state=running before CronCreate
